title: micromelum compressum var. compressum
intro: Micromelum compressum var. compressum, also known as the Java plum or Malabar plum, is a tropical fruit-bearing tree or shrub native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The Java plum has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the Java plum is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and jams, and its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical and cosmetic products.
